reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username and display it in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260417-194605-0aqb" in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened showing landing page with message input.
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator displayed "idle" status in the agent header.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was successfully typed into input field and sent, agent status changed to "working".
Account access request card appeared - Card displayed asking to grant GitHub account access with GitHub account already connected and checked.
Clicked "Allow Access" button to grant GitHub account permission - Access was granted, agent continued working.
API request review dialog appeared asking to allow "GET /user" request - Clicked "Allow Once" to proceed with the GitHub API call.
Waited approximately 2 minutes for agent response - Agent completed processing and returned to "idle" status after 1m 10s of work.

Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." along with tool execution cards showing successful "Request Connected Account GitHub" and "Bash Fetch GitHub user login" operations.
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the GitHub username response visible.
